message:
✨ Multi-debrid services, player controls, FPS sparkline, EPG tooltips (#60)

* ✨ Multi-debrid services, player controls, FPS sparkline, EPG tooltips, favorites

- Multi-debrid service management screen with expandable cards per service
- Player control bar: screenshot, favorites sheet, PiP, info, settings, channel list
- Real-time FPS monitoring with sparkline chart tooltip
- Volume mute toggle, dynamic codec and interlace badges
- EPG guide hover tooltips with program details and IMDB link
- Adaptive card-style UI for Trakt/TMDB/Debrid API keys
- Settings item in sidebar, providers as sub-dialog
- Per-channel favorites from player (database-backed)
- Channel list overlay in fullscreen player
- Skip reload on same channel tap
- Countdown snackbar utility

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* refactor: compact two-column channel info dialog

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
